mnemonics: P.A.S.S. the Initial Estimates: Parameters, AR, Start Simple.
keyPoints: Use sample autocorrelations to estimate AR parameters via Yule-Walker equations.
Use sample mean of the series as an initial estimate for the constant mean parameter.
For models with both AR and MA parts, initialize MA parameters to zero to simplify the initial estimation.
commonMistakes: Using arbitrary or random initial values which can cause the estimation algorithm to converge slowly or to a local optimum.
Assuming initial estimates are the final model parameters, rather than just a starting point for more precise iterative estimation methods.
Overcomplicating the initial guess for complex models instead of using simple, logical starting values like the sample mean or zero.
